mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.project_id AS "projectId", a.title, a.description, a.issue_attachments AS "issueAttachments", a.assignee, a.due_date AS "dueDate", a.confirmed, a.resolution, a.status, a.created_by AS "createdBy", a.created_at AS "createdAt", a.updated_by AS "updatedBy", a.updated_at AS "updatedAt", p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", creator.name AS "createdByName", assignee.name AS "assigneeName" FROM issue_ticket a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = a.created_by LEFT JOIN sys_account assignee ON assignee.id = a.assignee WHERE a.id = #{id}
